        "contents": "package tools\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n)\n\n// safeTool 安全的工具包装器，用于处理错误\ntype safeTool struct {\n\ttool.InvokableTool\n}\n\nfunc (s safeTool) Info(ctx context.Context) (*schema.ToolInfo, error) {\n\treturn s.InvokableTool.Info(ctx)\n}\n\nfunc (s safeTool) InvokableRun(ctx context.Context, argumentsInJSON string, opts ...tool.Option) (string, error) {\n\tout, e := s.InvokableTool.InvokableRun(ctx, argumentsInJSON, opts...)\n\tif e != nil {\n\t\treturn e.Error(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn out, nil\n}\n\n// SafeInferTool 安全地创建工具\nfunc SafeInferTool[T, D any](toolName, toolDesc string, i utils.InvokeFunc[T, D]) (tool.InvokableTool, error) {\n\tt, err := utils.InferTool(toolName, toolDesc, i)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn safeTool{\n\t\tInvokableTool: t,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// BaseTools 获取 digeino 提供的通用基础工具集\nfunc BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool\n\n\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具\n\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具\n\treturn tools, nil\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# DigEino 使用指南\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。\n\n## 1. 安装\n\n在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ngo get github.com/originaleric/digeino\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 2. 配置管理\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。\n\n### 2.1 依赖结构\n\n配置主要包含两个部分：\n- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。\n- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。\n\n### 2.2 使用示例\n\n#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）\n\n首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nHttpServer:\n  Api:\n    Port: \":20201\"\n\nStatus:\n  Webhook:\n    Enabled: true\n    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\"\n    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]\n  Store:\n    Enabled: true\n    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n然后在代码中加载：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\nfunc main() {\n    // 加载配置文件\n    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")\n    if err != nil {\n        panic(err)\n    }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\nfunc initConfig() {\n    cfg := config.Default()\n    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\"\n    config.Set(cfg)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 3. 核心功能使用\n\n### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\"\n\nfunc someProcess() {\n    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# Update: UI/UX Design Intelligence Plugin Integration\n\n**Date**: 2026-01-11\n**Category**: Feature / Tools\n\n## Summary\nIntegrated a comprehensive UI/UX Design Intelligence engine as a reusable tool within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to access professional design guidelines, color palettes, typography pairings, and interaction principles.\n\n## New Features\n- **Native search engine**: Efficient BM25-based retrieval system for design knowledge.\n- **Embedded Knowledge Base**: 400+ professional design rules and patterns embedded directly into the binary using &#96;//go:embed&#96;.\n- **Domain Detection**: Automatic detection of query intent (e.g., distinguishing between a request for \"colors\" vs. \"layout\").\n- **Stack-Specific Guidelines**: Support for technology-specific advice (React, Vue, Tailwind, SwiftUI, Flutter, etc.).\n- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework.\n\n## Components Added\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/bm25.go&#96;: Implementation of the BM25 ranking algorithm.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/detector.go&#96;: Natural language intent detector for design domains.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/service.go&#96;: Core orchestration service managing embedded CSV data.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/data/&#96;: Full dataset including styles, colors, UX guidelines, and implementation prompts.\n\n## How to Use\nImport the &#96;ui_ux&#96; package and register the tool:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n\n// ... \n\nuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\nif err == nil {\n    tools = append(tools, uiTool)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Impact\nThis update significantly lowers the barrier for AI agents to provide visually stunning and UX-sound UI recommendations without requiring external API calls or complex local file management.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Update: UI/UX Design Intelligence Plugin Integration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },

            "lineNumber": 3,

            "text": "Integrated a comprehensive UI/UX Design Intelligence engine as a reusable tool within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to access professional design guidelines, color palettes, typography pairings, and interaction principles."

          },

            "text": "## How to Use"

        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"os\"\n\n\t\"gopkg.in/yaml.v3\"\n)\n\n// Config 根配置结构\ntype Config struct {\n\tHttpServer HttpServerConfig &#96;yaml:\"HttpServer\" json:\"HttpServer\"&#96;\n\tStatus     StatusConfig     &#96;yaml:\"Status\" json:\"Status\"&#96;\n}\n\n// HttpServerConfig HTTP 服务配置\ntype HttpServerConfig struct {\n\tApi struct {\n\t\tPort string &#96;yaml:\"Port\" json:\"Port\"&#96;\n\t} &#96;yaml:\"Api\" json:\"Api\"&#96;\n}\n\n// StatusConfig 状态相关配置：包含 Webhook 与 Store\ntype StatusConfig struct {\n\tWebhook AppWebhookConfig  &#96;yaml:\"Webhook\" json:\"Webhook\"&#96;\n\tStore   StatusStoreConfig &#96;yaml:\"Store\" json:\"Store\"&#96;\n}\n\n// AppWebhookConfig 应用级 Webhook 配置\ntype AppWebhookConfig struct {\n\tEnabled *bool         &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tURL     string        &#96;yaml:\"URL\" json:\"URL,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tConfig  WebhookConfig &#96;yaml:\",inline\" json:\"Config\"&#96;\n}\n\n// WebhookConfig 基础 Webhook 配置\ntype WebhookConfig struct {\n\tURL        string            &#96;yaml:\"url\" json:\"url\"&#96;\n\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tTimeout    int               &#96;yaml:\"timeout\" json:\"timeout,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tRetryCount int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_count\" json:\"retry_count,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;\n}\n\n// StatusStoreConfig 状态存储配置\ntype StatusStoreConfig struct {\n\tEnabled *bool       &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tType    string      &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type,omitempty\"&#96; // memory, mysql\n\tMySQL   MySQLConfig &#96;yaml:\"MySQL\" json:\"MySQL\"&#96;\n}\n\n// MySQLConfig MySQL 配置\ntype MySQLConfig struct {\n\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;",

        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"embed\"\n\t\"encoding/csv\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\n//go:embed data/*.csv data/stacks/*.csv\nvar designData embed.FS\n\n// CSVConfigEntry defines the configuration for each design domain\ntype CSVConfigEntry struct {\n\tFile       string\n\tSearchCols []string\n\tOutputCols []string\n}\n\n// CSVConfigs maps domain keys to their respective CSV configurations\nvar CSVConfigs = map[string]CSVConfigEntry{\n\t\"style\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/styles.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Keywords\", \"Best For\", \"Type\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary Colors\", \"Effects \u0026 Animation\", \"Best For\", \"Performance\", \"Accessibility\", \"Framework Compatibility\", \"Complexity\"},\n\t},\n\t\"prompt\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/prompts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\", \"Implementation Checklist\"},\n\t},\n\t\"color\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/colors.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary (Hex)\", \"Secondary (Hex)\", \"CTA (Hex)\", \"Background (Hex)\", \"Text (Hex)\", \"Border (Hex)\", \"Notes\"},\n\t},\n\t\"chart\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/charts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Accessibility Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Secondary Options\", \"Color Guidance\", \"Accessibility Notes\", \"Library Recommendation\", \"Interactive Level\"},\n\t},\n\t\"landing\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/landing.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Conversion Optimization\", \"Section Order\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Section Order\", \"Primary CTA Placement\", \"Color Strategy\", \"Conversion Optimization\"},\n\t},\n\t\"product\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/products.csv\",",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "type MySQLConfig struct {\n\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;\n\tPort        int    &#96;yaml:\"Port\"&#96;\n\tUser        string &#96;yaml:\"User\"&#96;\n\tPassword    string &#96;yaml:\"Password\"&#96;\n\tDatabase    string &#96;yaml:\"Database\"&#96;\n\tExecTable   string &#96;yaml:\"ExecTable\"&#96;\n\tStatusTable string &#96;yaml:\"StatusTable\"&#96;\n}\n\nvar (\n\t// DefaultConfig 全局默认配置\n\tcurrentConfig *Config\n)\n\n// Load 从文件加载配置\nfunc Load(path string) (*Config, error) {\n\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar cfg Config\n\tif err := yaml.Unmarshal(data, \u0026cfg); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcurrentConfig = \u0026cfg\n\treturn \u0026cfg, nil\n}\n\n// Get 获取当前配置\nfunc Get() *Config {\n\tif currentConfig == nil {\n\t\tcurrentConfig = Default()\n\t}\n\treturn currentConfig\n}\n\n// Set 设置当前配置\nfunc Set(cfg *Config) {\n\tcurrentConfig = cfg\n}\n\n// Default 返回默认配置\nfunc Default() *Config {\n\tenabled := true\n\treturn \u0026Config{\n\t\tHttpServer: HttpServerConfig{\n\t\t\tApi: struct {\n\t\t\t\tPort string &#96;yaml:\"Port\" json:\"Port\"&#96;\n\t\t\t}{\n\t\t\t\tPort: \":20201\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStatus: StatusConfig{\n\t\t\tWebhook: AppWebhookConfig{\n\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,\n\t\t\t\tConfig: WebhookConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tMethod:     \"POST\",\n\t\t\t\t\tTimeout:    5,\n\t\t\t\t\tRetryCount: 3,\n\t\t\t\t\tRetryDelay: 1000,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStore: StatusStoreConfig{\n\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,\n\t\t\t\tType:    \"memory\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}",

        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n)\n\n// UIUXSearchRequest defines the input parameters for the UI/UX search tool.\ntype UIUXSearchRequest struct {\n\tQuery      string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"description=检索关键词，如 'minimalism color palette' 或 'dashboard layout'\"&#96;\n\tDomain     string &#96;json:\"domain,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=检索领域，可选值: style, color, chart, landing, product, prompt, ux, typography. 不填则自动检测\"&#96;\n\tStack      string &#96;json:\"stack,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=特定技术栈，如 react, tailwind, swiftui 等\"&#96;\n\tMaxResults int    &#96;json:\"max_results,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=最大返回结果数，默认 5,default=5\"&#96;\n}\n\n// UIUXSearchResponse defines the output format for the UI/UX search tool.\ntype UIUXSearchResponse struct {\n\tResult string &#96;json:\"result\"&#96;\n}\n\n// NewUIUXSearchTool creates a new Eino tool for UI/UX design intelligence.\nfunc NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package webhook\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\n// GetWebhookConfig 从全局配置获取 WebhookConfig\nfunc GetWebhookConfig(buildDefaultURL func() string) *config.WebhookConfig {\n\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Webhook\n\tif cfg.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 !*cfg.Enabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// 这里需要注意，Config 是 WebhookConfig 类型\n\twebhookConfig := \u0026cfg.Config\n\tif webhookConfig.URL == \"\" {\n\t\tif cfg.URL != \"\" {\n\t\t\twebhookConfig.URL = cfg.URL\n\t\t} else if buildDefaultURL != nil {\n\t\t\twebhookConfig.URL = buildDefaultURL()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif webhookConfig.Method == \"\" {\n\t\twebhookConfig.Method = \"POST\"\n\t}\n\tif webhookConfig.Timeout == 0 {\n\t\twebhookConfig.Timeout = 5\n\t}\n\tif webhookConfig.RetryCount == 0 {\n\t\twebhookConfig.RetryCount = 3\n\t}\n\tif webhookConfig.RetryDelay == 0 {\n\t\twebhookConfig.RetryDelay = 1000\n\t}\n\n\treturn webhookConfig\n}\n\n// IsStoreEnabled 检查 Store 是否启用\nfunc IsStoreEnabled() bool {\n\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Store\n\tif cfg.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 !*cfg.Enabled {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// BuildDefaultWebhookURL 构建默认的本地 webhook URL\nfunc BuildDefaultWebhookURL(scheme, host string) string {\n\tif host == \"\" {\n\t\tport := config.Get().HttpServer.Api.Port\n\t\tif port == \"\" {\n\t\t\thost = \"localhost\"\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(port, \":\") {\n\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost\" + port\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost:\" + port\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s://%s/api/v1/webhook/status\", scheme, host)\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package digeino\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n)\n\n// AgentState 是在多 Agent 流程中传递的全局状态\n// 注意：业务特定的结构体（如 Outline, Pages, Design 等）应通过 Extensions 字段存储\n// 各个项目可以在自己的包中定义业务结构体，并使用 GetBusinessData/SetBusinessData 方法访问\ntype AgentState struct {\n\tSessionID       string                 &#96;json:\"session_id\"&#96;\n\tQuery           string                 &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;            // 用户的原始需求\n\tStatus          string                 &#96;json:\"status\"&#96;           // 当前状态\n\tResearchSummary string                 &#96;json:\"research_summary\"&#96; // Researcher 节点的输出总结\n\tExtensions      map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"extensions,omitempty\"&#96; // 扩展字段，用于存储项目特定的数据\n\tError           error                  &#96;json:\"error\"&#96;            // 错误信息\n}\n\n// ContextKey 用于在 context 中传递 key\ntype ContextKey string\n\nconst (\n\tCtxKeySessionID ContextKey = \"session_id\"\n)\n\n// GetExtension 获取扩展字段的值\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetExtension(key string) (interface{}, bool) {\n\tif s.Extensions == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, false\n\t}\n\tval, ok := s.Extensions[key]\n\treturn val, ok\n}\n\n// SetExtension 设置扩展字段的值\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetExtension(key string, value interface{}) {\n\tif s.Extensions == nil {\n\t\ts.Extensions = make(map[string]interface{})\n\t}\n\ts.Extensions[key] = value\n}\n\n// GetStringExtension 获取字符串类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetStringExtension(key string) (string, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn \"\", false\n\t}\n\tstr, ok := val.(string)\n\treturn str, ok\n}\n\n// SetStringExtension 设置字符串类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetStringExtension(key string, value string) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}\n\n// GetIntExtension 获取整数类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetIntExtension(key string) (int, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn 0, false\n\t}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\"ui_ux_search\", \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库，包括样式指南(style)、配色方案(color)、字体排版(typography)、交互原则(ux)、落地页模式(landing)等。支持按技术栈(stack)过滤，如 react, tailwind 等。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *UIUXSearchRequest) (*UIUXSearchResponse, error) {\n\t\t\tif req.MaxResults \u003c= 0 {\n\t\t\t\treq.MaxResults = 5\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar res *SearchResult\n\t\t\tvar err error\n\n\t\t\tif req.Stack != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tres, err = service.SearchStack(req.Query, req.Stack, req.MaxResults)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tres, err = service.Search(req.Query, req.Domain, req.MaxResults)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Format results as a readable string for the LLM\n\t\t\tvar sb strings.Builder\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"检索结果 (领域: %s, 原始查询: %s):\\n\\n\", res.Domain, res.Query))\n\t\t\tfor i, r := range res.Results {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"--- 建议 %d ---\\n\", i+1))\n\t\t\t\tfor k, v := range r {\n\t\t\t\t\tif v != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s: %s\\n\", k, v))\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn \u0026UIUXSearchResponse{Result: sb.String()}, nil\n\t\t})\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\"\n\nfunc GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {\n    var outline *DocumentOutline\n    err := state.GetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, \u0026outline)\n    return outline, err\n}\n\nfunc SetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState, outline *DocumentOutline) {\n    state.SetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, outline)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 5. AgentState 架构说明\n\n### 5.1 核心字段\n\n&#96;AgentState&#96; 只包含通用的核心字段：\n- &#96;SessionID&#96;: 会话标识\n- &#96;Query&#96;: 用户查询\n- &#96;Status&#96;: 状态标识\n- &#96;ResearchSummary&#96;: 研究总结\n- &#96;Extensions&#96;: 扩展字段（用于存储项目特定的数据）\n\n### 5.2 业务结构体\n\n**重要**：&#96;DigEino&#96; 是一个通用库，不包含任何业务特定的结构体（如 &#96;DocumentOutline&#96;、&#96;Page&#96;、&#96;DesignConfig&#96; 等）。这些结构体应该在您的项目包中定义，并通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储。\n\n这样做的好处：\n- ✅ 保持 &#96;DigEino&#96; 的通用性和可复用性\n- ✅ 不同项目可以定义自己的业务结构体\n- ✅ 避免业务逻辑污染核心库\n- ✅ 更好的类型安全和代码组织\n\n### 5.3 迁移指南\n\n如果您之前使用了 &#96;AgentState&#96; 中的业务字段（如 &#96;Outline&#96;、&#96;Pages&#96; 等），需要：\n\n1. 在项目包中定义这些业务结构体\n2. 使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 或自定义辅助方法访问\n3. 参考 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 项目的实现作为示例\n\n## 6. 常见问题\n\n- **独立性**: &#96;DigEino&#96; 现在不再依赖 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 的 internal 包，可以安全地在任何 Go 项目中 import。\n- **扩展性**: 如果需要增加新的配置项，请在 &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/config&#96; 包中扩展 &#96;Config&#96; 结构体。\n- **项目特定字段**: 使用 &#96;AgentState.Extensions&#96; 字段存储项目特定的数据，而不是修改核心库的 &#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体。\n- **业务结构体**: 所有业务特定的结构体都应该在项目包中定义，通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储，并使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法访问。",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\""
          },

            "lineNumber": 234
          },

            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "func GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "    var outline *DocumentOutline"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "    err := state.GetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, \u0026outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "    return outline, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "func SetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState, outline *DocumentOutline) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "    state.SetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, outline)"
          },

            "lineNumber": 243,

            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func someProcess() {\n    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）\n    store := status.GetDefaultStore()\n    \n    // 创建执行记录\n    record := store.CreateExecution(\"exec_id_001\", \"my_app\", \"req_id_001\")\n    \n    // 更新状态\n    store.AddStatus(\"exec_id_001\", webhook.ExecutionStatus{\n        Type: \"node_start\",\n        NodeKey: \"node_1\",\n        Status: \"running\",\n    })\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3.2 Webhook 客户端\n\n用于将状态更新通过 HTTP 回调发送给第三方系统。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\nfunc notifyCallback() {\n    // 获取 Webhook 配置\n    webhookCfg := webhook.GetWebhookConfig(nil)\n    if webhookCfg == nil {\n        return\n    }\n\n    client := webhook.NewWebhookClient(webhookCfg)\n    err := client.SendStatus(context.Background(), statusInfo)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 4. AgentState 扩展字段\n\n&#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体提供了 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段，允许各个项目存储特定的扩展数据，而无需修改核心库。\n\n### 4.1 基本使用\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino\"\n\n// 创建 AgentState\nstate := \u0026digeino.AgentState{\n    SessionID: \"session_001\",\n    Query:     \"用户查询\",\n}\n\n// 设置扩展字段（字符串类型）\nstate.SetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\", \"/path/to/file.pdf\")\nstate.SetStringExtension(\"custom_field\", \"custom_value\")\n\n// 设置扩展字段（整数类型）\nstate.SetIntExtension(\"page_count\", 10)\n\n// 设置扩展字段（布尔类型）\nstate.SetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\", true)\n\n// 设置任意类型的扩展字段\nstate.SetExtension(\"complex_data\", map[string]interface{}{\n    \"key1\": \"value1\",\n    \"key2\": 123,\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4.2 获取扩展字段\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 获取字符串类型\npdfPath, ok := state.GetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"PDF Path: %s\\n\", pdfPath)\n}\n\n// 获取整数类型\npageCount, ok := state.GetIntExtension(\"page_count\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)\n}\n\n// 获取布尔类型",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package webhook\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"crypto/hmac\"\n\t\"crypto/sha256\"\n\t\"encoding/hex\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\n// WebhookClient Webhook 客户端\ntype WebhookClient struct {\n\tconfig *config.WebhookConfig\n\tclient *http.Client\n}\n\nvar (\n\t// 共享 Transport 以复用连接池\n\tdefaultTransport = \u0026http.Transport{\n\t\tMaxIdleConns:        100,\n\t\tMaxIdleConnsPerHost: 100, // 显著提高单主机并发连接数，特别适用于本地 Webhook\n\t\tIdleConnTimeout:     90 * time.Second,\n\t}\n)\n\n// NewWebhookClient 创建 Webhook 客户端\nfunc NewWebhookClient(config *config.WebhookConfig) *WebhookClient {\n\ttimeout := time.Duration(config.Timeout) * time.Second\n\tif timeout == 0 {\n\t\ttimeout = 5 * time.Second\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026WebhookClient{\n\t\tconfig: config,\n\t\tclient: \u0026http.Client{\n\t\t\tTimeout:   timeout,\n\t\t\tTransport: defaultTransport,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\n// SendStatus 发送状态更新\nfunc (c *WebhookClient) SendStatus(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) error {\n\t// 检查事件是否被订阅\n\tif len(c.config.Events) \u003e 0",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# DigEino Updates - 2026-01-02\n\n## Overview\nEnhanced the &#96;StatusCollector&#96; and improved type compatibility to better support complex integrations like &#96;DigFlow&#96;.\n\n## Changes\n\n### Webhook Module\n- **&#96;StatusCollector&#96; Enhancements**:\n    - Added &#96;GetExecutionID()&#96;: Allows retrieving the associated Execution ID.\n    - Added &#96;GetStatusHistory()&#96;: Returns a snapshot of the execution status history.\n    - Added &#96;GetTotalUsage()&#96;: Returns the aggregated Token Usage for the session.\n- **Interface Decoupling**:\n    - Refactored &#96;StatusStoreInterface&#96;: Removed &#96;CreateExecution&#96; from the base interface in the &#96;webhook&#96; package. This allows for cleaner separation of concerns, as execution creation is typically handled at the controller/application level.\n\n### Status Module\n- **Compatibility Fix**:\n    - Standardized &#96;StatusStore&#96; implementation to match the updated &#96;webhook.StatusStoreInterface&#96;.\n\n### Tools Module\n- **&#96;BaseTools&#96; Setup**:\n    - Initialized &#96;BaseTools&#96; function in &#96;tools.go&#96; to provide a central registry for shared cross-project tools.\n\n## Versioning\n- Released as **v1.0.2**.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino Updates - 2026-01-02"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## Overview"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "Enhanced the &#96;StatusCollector&#96; and improved type compatibility to better support complex integrations like &#96;DigFlow&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "### Webhook Module"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- **&#96;StatusCollector&#96; Enhancements**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    - Added &#96;GetExecutionID()&#96;: Allows retrieving the associated Execution ID."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    - Added &#96;GetStatusHistory()&#96;: Returns a snapshot of the execution status history."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    - Added &#96;GetTotalUsage()&#96;: Returns the aggregated Token Usage for the session."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **Interface Decoupling**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    - Refactored &#96;StatusStoreInterface&#96;: Removed &#96;CreateExecution&#96; from the base interface in the &#96;webhook&#96; package. This allows for cleaner separation of concerns, as execution creation is typically handled at the controller/application level."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "### Status Module"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- **Compatibility Fix**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    - Standardized &#96;StatusStore&#96; implementation to match the updated &#96;webhook.StatusStoreInterface&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "### Tools Module"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- **&#96;BaseTools&#96; Setup**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    - Initialized &#96;BaseTools&#96; function in &#96;tools.go&#96; to provide a central registry for shared cross-project tools."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "## Versioning"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "- Released as **v1.0.2**."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/20260102.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.153100848197937

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *UIUXService) Search(query string, domain string, maxResults int) (*SearchResult, error) {\n\tif domain == \"\" {\n\t\tdomain = DetectDomain(query)\n\t}\n\n\tconfig, ok := CSVConfigs[domain]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tconfig = CSVConfigs[\"style\"]\n\t\tdomain = \"style\"\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := s.loadCSV(config.File)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to load csv %s: %w\", config.File, err)\n\t}\n\n\tdocuments := make([]string, len(data))\n\tfor i, row := range data {\n\t\tvar builder strings.Builder\n\t\tfor _, col := range config.SearchCols {\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteString(row[col])\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteString(\" \")\n\t\t}\n\t\tdocuments[i] = builder.String()\n\t}\n\n\tbm25 := NewBM25(1.5, 0.75)\n\tbm25.Fit(documents)\n\tranked := bm25.Score(query)\n\n\tsort.Slice(ranked, func(i, j int) bool {\n\t\treturn ranked[i].Score \u003e ranked[j].Score\n\t})\n\n\tvar finalResults []map[string]string\n\tfor i := 0; i \u003c len(ranked) \u0026\u0026 len(finalResults) \u003c maxResults; i++ {\n\t\tif ranked[i].Score \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\torigRow := data[ranked[i].Index]\n\t\t\tfilteredRow := make(map[string]string)\n\t\t\tfor _, col := range config.OutputCols {\n\t\t\t\tif val, ok := origRow[col]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tfilteredRow[col] = val\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfinalResults = append(finalResults, filteredRow)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026SearchResult{\n\t\tDomain:  domain,\n\t\tQuery:   query,\n\t\tFile:    config.File,\n\t\tCount:   len(finalResults),\n\t\tResults: finalResults,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// SearchStack performs a BM25 search for technology-specific design guidelines\nfunc (s *UIUXService) SearchStack(query string, stack string, maxResults int) (*SearchResult, error) {\n\tfilename, ok := StackConfigs[stack]",

        "contents": "package digeino\n\nimport (\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n)\n\ntype UserMessage struct {\n\tID      string            &#96;json:\"id\"&#96;\n\tQuery   string            &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;\n\tHistory []*schema.Message &#96;json:\"history\"&#96;\n}\n\n// ========== Webhook 和 StatusStore 相关类型定义（从 webhook 或 config 包重新导出） ==========\n\n// Usage 使用量统计\ntype Usage = webhook.Usage\n\n// ExecutionStatus 执行状态\ntype ExecutionStatus = webhook.ExecutionStatus\n\n// DataFlowStatus 数据流状态\ntype DataFlowStatus = webhook.DataFlowStatus\n\n// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态\ntype ControlFlowStatus = webhook.ControlFlowStatus\n\n// WebhookConfig Webhook 配置\ntype WebhookConfig = config.WebhookConfig\n\n// WebhookPayload Webhook 请求体\ntype WebhookPayload = webhook.WebhookPayload\n\n// Message 消息（用于 Webhook 和 StatusStore）\ntype Message = webhook.Message",

        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\nvar domainKeywords = map[string][]string{\n\t\"color\":      {\"color\", \"palette\", \"hex\", \"#\", \"rgb\"},\n\t\"chart\":      {\"chart\", \"graph\", \"visualization\", \"trend\", \"bar\", \"pie\", \"scatter\", \"heatmap\", \"funnel\"},\n\t\"landing\":    {\"landing\", \"page\", \"cta\", \"conversion\", \"hero\", \"testimonial\", \"pricing\", \"section\"},\n\t\"product\":    {\"saas\", \"ecommerce\", \"e-commerce\", \"fintech\", \"healthcare\", \"gaming\", \"portfolio\", \"crypto\", \"dashboard\"},\n\t\"prompt\":     {\"prompt\", \"css\", \"implementation\", \"variable\", \"checklist\", \"tailwind\"},\n\t\"style\":      {\"style\", \"design\", \"ui\", \"minimalism\", \"glassmorphism\", \"neumorphism\", \"brutalism\", \"dark mode\", \"flat\", \"aurora\"},\n\t\"ux\":         {\"ux\", \"usability\", \"accessibility\", \"wcag\", \"touch\", \"scroll\", \"animation\", \"keyboard\", \"navigation\", \"mobile\"},\n\t\"typography\": {\"font\", \"typography\", \"heading\", \"serif\", \"sans\"},\n}\n\n// DetectDomain auto-detects the most relevant domain from the query.\nfunc DetectDomain(query string) string {\n\tqueryLower := strings.ToLower(query)\n\tqueryPadded := \" \" + queryLower + \" \"\n\tscores := make(map[string]int)\n\n\tfor domain, keywords := range domainKeywords {\n\t\tscore := 0\n\t\tfor _, kw := range keywords {\n\t\t\tif strings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\" \") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\",\") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\".\") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\"?\") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\"!\") {\n\t\t\t\tscore++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tscores[domain] = score\n\t}\n\n\tbestDomain := \"style\"\n\tmaxScore := 0\n\n\tfor _, domain := range []string{\"color\", \"chart\", \"landing\", \"product\", \"prompt\", \"style\", \"ux\", \"typography\"} {\n\t\tif scores[domain] \u003e maxScore {\n\t\t\tmaxScore = scores[domain]\n\t\t\tbestDomain = domain\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn bestDomain\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# DigEino Performance Optimization Update - 2026-01-11\n\n## Overview\nThis update focuses on improving the responsiveness of Eino-based applications by eliminating blocking operations in the status collection and webhook delivery layer.\n\n## Key Changes\n\n### 1. Asynchronous Status Collection\nThe &#96;StatusCollector&#96; has been refactored to prevent slowing down the main execution graph during state persistence and webhook delivery.\n- **Async Execution**: &#96;StatusStore.AddStatus&#96; and &#96;WebhookClient.SendStatus&#96; now run in their own goroutines.\n- **Benefit**: Zero-latency impact on the Eino Graph from slow database writes or network-constrained webhook endpoints.\n- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/status_collector.go&#96;\n\n### 2. HTTP Connection Pooling for Webhooks\n&#96;WebhookClient&#96; now utilizes a shared, high-performance HTTP Transport.\n- **Connection Reuse**: Configured &#96;MaxIdleConns&#96; and &#96;MaxIdleConnsPerHost&#96; to &#96;100&#96; to support high-frequency event delivery.\n- **Benefit**: Significantly reduces per-request overhead and prevents port exhaustion under load.\n- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/webhook_client.go&#96;\n\n### 3. Improved Token Usage Tracking\n- **Aggregation**: Enhanced the &#96;CollectTokenUsage&#96; logic to accurately sum tokens across complex parallel and nested nodes.\n- **Benefit**: Provides a reliable metric for cost and performance monitoring.\n\n## Impact\nThese changes collectively allow &#96;DigFlow&#96; and other dependent agents to achieve significantly higher throughput and lower end-to-end latency, especially in multi-node graph architectures.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino Performance Optimization Update - 2026-01-11"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## Overview"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "This update focuses on improving the responsiveness of Eino-based applications by eliminating blocking operations in the status collection and webhook delivery layer."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Key Changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "### 1. Asynchronous Status Collection"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "The &#96;StatusCollector&#96; has been refactored to prevent slowing down the main execution graph during state persistence and webhook delivery."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **Async Execution**: &#96;StatusStore.AddStatus&#96; and &#96;WebhookClient.SendStatus&#96; now run in their own goroutines."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Zero-latency impact on the Eino Graph from slow database writes or network-constrained webhook endpoints."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/status_collector.go&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "### 2. HTTP Connection Pooling for Webhooks"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;WebhookClient&#96; now utilizes a shared, high-performance HTTP Transport."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- **Connection Reuse**: Configured &#96;MaxIdleConns&#96; and &#96;MaxIdleConnsPerHost&#96; to &#96;100&#96; to support high-frequency event delivery."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Significantly reduces per-request overhead and prevents port exhaustion under load."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/webhook_client.go&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "### 3. Improved Token Usage Tracking"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- **Aggregation**: Enhanced the &#96;CollectTokenUsage&#96; logic to accurately sum tokens across complex parallel and nested nodes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Provides a reliable metric for cost and performance monitoring."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "## Impact"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "These changes collectively allow &#96;DigFlow&#96; and other dependent agents to achieve significantly higher throughput and lower end-to-end latency, especially in multi-node graph architectures."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-01-11-performance-optimization.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.10202749818563461
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ",\n\t}\n}\n\n// SendStatus 发送状态更新\nfunc (c *WebhookClient) SendStatus(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) error {\n\t// 检查事件是否被订阅\n\tif len(c.config.Events) \u003e 0 {\n\t\tsubscribed := false\n\t\tfor _, e := range c.config.Events {\n\t\t\tif e == status.Type {\n\t\t\t\tsubscribed = true\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif !subscribed {\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tpayload := WebhookPayload{\n\t\tEvent:  status.Type,\n\t\tStatus: status,\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(payload)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"marshal payload failed: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 如果配置了密钥，生成签名\n\tif c.config.Secret != \"\" {\n\t\tpayload.Signature = c.generateSignature(data, c.config.Secret)\n\t\t// 重新序列化包含签名的 payload\n\t\tdata, _ = json.Marshal(payload)\n\t}\n\n\tvar lastErr error\n\tretryCount := c.config.RetryCount\n\tif retryCount == 0 {\n\t\tretryCount = 3\n\t}\n\tretryDelay := time.Duration(c.config.RetryDelay) * time.Millisecond\n\tif retryDelay == 0 {\n\t\tretryDelay = 1000 * time.Millisecond\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i \u003c= retryCount; i++ {\n\t\tif i \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\ttime.Sleep(retryDelay)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\terr = c.doPost(ctx, data)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastErr = err\n\t}\n\n\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"send webhook failed after %d retries: %w\", retryCount, lastErr)\n}\n\nfunc (c *WebhookClient) doPost(ctx context.Context, data []byte) error {\n\tmethod := c.config.Method\n\tif method == \"\" {\n\t\tmethod = \"POST\"\n\t}\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, method, c.config.URL, bytes.NewBuffer(data))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\tfor k, v := range c.config.Headers {\n\t\treq.Header.Set(k, v)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := c.client.Do(req)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n\n\tif resp.StatusCode \u003e= 200 \u0026\u0026 resp.StatusCode \u003c 300 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"http status error: %d\", resp.StatusCode)\n}\n\nfunc (c *WebhookClient) generateSignature(data []byte, secret string) string {\n\th := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(secret))\n\th.Write(data)\n\treturn hex.EncodeToString(h.Sum(nil))\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": ","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "// SendStatus 发送状态更新"
          },

        "contents": "func (s *AgentState) GetIntExtension(key string) (int, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn 0, false\n\t}\n\t// 支持多种数字类型\n\tswitch v := val.(type) {\n\tcase int:\n\t\treturn v, true\n\tcase int64:\n\t\treturn int(v), true\n\tcase float64:\n\t\treturn int(v), true\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn 0, false\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetIntExtension 设置整数类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetIntExtension(key string, value int) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}\n\n// GetBoolExtension 获取布尔类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetBoolExtension(key string) (bool, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn false, false\n\t}\n\tb, ok := val.(bool)\n\treturn b, ok\n}\n\n// SetBoolExtension 设置布尔类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetBoolExtension(key string, value bool) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}\n\n// GetBusinessData 获取业务数据结构（通过 JSON 序列化/反序列化进行类型转换）\n// 用于获取存储在 Extensions 中的复杂业务对象\n// 示例：var outline *DocumentOutline; err := state.GetBusinessData(\"outline\", \u0026outline)\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetBusinessData(key string, target interface{}) error {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"key %s not found in extensions\", key)\n\t}\n\t// 使用 JSON 序列化/反序列化进行类型转换\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(val)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal business data for key %s: %w\", key, err)\n\t}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(data, target); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to unmarshal business data for key %s: %w\", key, err)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// SetBusinessData 设置业务数据结构\n// 用于将复杂业务对象存储到 Extensions 中\n// 示例：state.SetBusinessData(\"outline\", outline)\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetBusinessData(key string, value interface{}) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}",

                  "content": "| Web Search Results |  | 您提到在 &#96;dataFetcher&#96; 节点中是通过 &#96;AddToolsNode&#96; 方法添加工具节点的，因此认为 &#96;wx&#96; 工具也应通过 &#96;AddToolsNode&#96; 添加。&#96;AddToolsNode&#96; 方法通常用于在图编排中添加工具节点，以便在流程中调用特定的工具或服务。\u003cbr/\u003e\u003cbr/\u003e在之前的实现中，我们选择使用 &#96;LambdaNode&#96; 来调用 &#96;wx&#96; 工具，主要是因为 &#96;LambdaNode&#96; 提供了更灵活的方式来执行自定义逻辑，并且可以直接调用工具函数。然而，考虑到一致性和代码的可维护性，采用 &#96;AddToolsNode&#96; 方法来添加 &#96;wx&#96; 工具节点是一个合理的选择。\u003cbr/\u003e\u003cbr/\u003e因此，建议在 &#96;analysisNode&#96; 后添加一个 &#96;ToolsNode&#96;，并通过 &#96;AddToolsNode&#96; 方法将 &#96;wx&#96; 工具添加到该节点中。这样可以确保流程的一致性，并利用 &#96;AddToolsNode&#96; 方法的优势来管理工具节点。 |",

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


已创建微信推送工具。总结如下：

## 已完成的工作

1. **创建了 `tools/wx/` 目录和相关文件**：
   - `wx_types.go` - 类型定义
   - `wx_token.go` - AccessToken 管理（缓存、自动刷新）
   - `wx_message.go` - 消息发送逻辑
   - `tool.go` - Eino 工具包装器

2. **在全局配置中添加了微信配置**：
   - 在 `config/config.go` 中添加了 `WeChatConfig` 结构
   - 配置项包括：`Enabled`、`AppID`、`AppSecret`、`OpenIDs`、`TokenFilePath`

3. **更新了配置文件**：
   - 在 `config/config.yaml` 中添加了微信配置示例

4. **注册了工具**：
   - 在 `tools/tools.go` 的 `BaseTools` 函数中注册了微信推送工具

## 关于配置位置的建议

**建议将配置放在全局配置中**，原因：
1. 微信推送是通用工具，多个项目可能都需要
2. 统一管理，便于维护
3. 与参考项目（DigStockAgent）的做法一致
4. 通过 `Enabled` 字段控制是否启用，不影响未使用的项目

## 使用方法

1. 在 `config/config.yaml` 中配置：
```yaml
WeChat:
  Enabled: true
  AppID: "your_appid"
  AppSecret: "your_app_secret"
  OpenIDs: 
    - "openid1"
    - "openid2"
  TokenFilePath: "storage/app/wechat/access_token.json"
```

2. 工具会自动注册到 `BaseTools` 中，如果配置未启用或配置不完整，工具创建会失败但不影响其他工具。

3. 工具名称为 `send_wechat_message`，支持：
   - 发送给配置中的所有用户（不指定 openid）
   - 发送给单个用户（指定 openid）

代码已创建完成，可以直接使用。

---

**关于之前退出代码1的问题：**

原因是路径中包含特殊字符（空格和中文字符）。当使用 `cd` 命令时，shell 可能无法正确解析包含空格的路径，即使使用了引号。解决方案是：
